method: Routed drive time (OSRM, OpenStreetMap England road network, car profile). Origin = LSOA polygon centroid; candidates and file schema unchanged from the estimated build: each LSOA stores its nearest 4 candidate sites as [siteIdx, minutes]. Hypothetical added sites in the app are still scored with the estimation model until routed on demand.
sites: Moorfields Eye Centre At St George'S Hospital
Ucl At Westmoreland Street (The Heart Hospital)
St Georges At Queen Mary'S Hospital
University College Hospital Grafton Way Building
